TutorApplications.title: Tutor Applications
TutorApplications.description: Review and manage new tutor onboarding requests.

detail.title: Detailed Review
detail.verifiedBadge: PhD in Theoretical Mathematics · Identity Verified
detail.reviewFeedbackPlaceholder: Enter notes or reasons for approval / rejection...

LessonComplaints.title: Lesson Complaints
LessonComplaints.description: Review student complaints about completed lessons. Approving refunds the lesson payment to the student wallet.
LessonComplaints.searchPlaceholder: Search by student, tutor, or reason...

list.title: Complaint queue
list.subtitle: {count} requests
list.awaitingAdminReview: Not sent to the tutor yet. Request tutor review or approve/reject directly.
list.awaitingTutorConfirmation: Waiting for the tutor to confirm or decline this complaint.
list.requestTutorReviewSuccess: The tutor has been notified to review this complaint.

confirmApprove.title: Approve this complaint?
confirmApprove.description: The tutor has confirmed this complaint. The lesson payment will be refunded to the student's wallet. This action cannot be undone.

confirmApproveWithoutTutor.title: Approve without tutor confirmation?
confirmApproveWithoutTutor.description: The tutor has not confirmed this complaint yet (or has not been asked to review it). Approving now will refund the student immediately. Continue only if you have reviewed the evidence.

confirmReject.title: Reject this complaint?
confirmReject.description: The student will be notified. Add an admin note above if you want to explain the decision.

approveDialog.title: Accept withdrawal
approveDialog.description: Confirm the bank transfer details before settling this withdrawal.
approveDialog.error: Failed to accept withdrawal. Please try again.
approveDialog.proofHint: Upload a screenshot or receipt of the bank transfer (PDF, JPG, PNG, max 15MB).
approveDialog.proofUploadPrompt: Click or drag the receipt here
approveDialog.proofRequiredError: Please upload the payment proof before confirming.
approveDialog.proofUploadError: Failed to upload the payment proof. Please try again.
approveDialog.proofTooLargeError: File is too large. Maximum size is 15MB.
approveDialog.proofInvalidTypeError: Unsupported file type. Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG.

rejectDialog.title: Reject withdrawal
rejectDialog.description: Enter the rejection message that will be saved as the admin note.
rejectDialog.notePlaceholder: Explain why this withdrawal request is rejected...
rejectDialog.noteRequiredError: Please enter a reason for the rejection.
rejectDialog.error: Failed to reject withdrawal. Please try again.

detailDialog.title: Withdrawal detail
detailDialog.description: Withdrawal request information and the bank transfer proof.
detailDialog.copyProofError: Failed to copy image. Please try again.

Transactions.title: Transactions
Transactions.description: Track money in and out across all platform wallets.

AppSettings.title: App Settings
AppSettings.description: Configure platform fees, time periods, and withdrawal limits.
AppSettings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

fees.title: Platform fee
fees.description: Percentage charged on each lesson payment.

periods.title: Time periods
periods.description: Settlement, dispute window, and lesson change rules (in hours).

withdrawal.title: Minimum withdrawal
withdrawal.description: Minimum amount tutors can request per currency.

mezonLinks.title: Mezon links
mezonLinks.description: Bot and Channel App invite links used on the onboarding guide.

socials.title: Social links
socials.description: Social media links shown in the footer.

youtube.title: YouTube (tutor intro videos)
youtube.description: Playlist and duration limits applied when admin approves tutor profiles.

fields.subscriptionGroupDiscountPercentHint: Example: 25 means 25% off the total group tuition.
fields.settlementPeriodHoursHint: Hours after lesson end before funds are released to the tutor.
fields.disputePeriodHoursHint: Hours after lesson end when students can file a complaint.
fields.lessonChangePeriodHoursHint: Hours before lesson start required to reschedule a lesson.
fields.botInviteLinkHint: Bot install link from the Mezon Developer Portal.
fields.channelAppLinkHint: Channel App install link from the Mezon Developer Portal.
fields.youtubePlaylistIdHint: Optional. Example: PLxxxxxxxx. Used when publishing approved tutor videos to YouTube. Leave blank to skip adding videos to a playlist.
fields.youtubeIntroVideoMaxDurationSecondsHint: Maximum length for tutor introduction videos during registration and approval.

validation.invalidUrl: Enter a valid URL (http/https) or leave blank.
validation.invalidPlaylistId: Enter a valid YouTube playlist ID (starts with PL) or leave blank.
validation.summary: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.

Events.title: Event review
Events.description: Review user-submitted events and publish them for the public site.

list.title: Event list
list.description: Open an item to review and approve.

detail.closeSuccess: Event closed. It is no longer shown publicly.
detail.approveUpdateSuccess: Update applied to the published event.

publishDialog.title: Publish this event?
publishDialog.description: It will appear on the homepage and public event detail page.

rejectDialog.title: Reject this event?
rejectDialog.description: The submitter will see a rejected status with your reason.
rejectDialog.label: Reason

closeDialog.title: Close this event?
closeDialog.description: It will be hidden from the homepage and public detail page. Data is kept and you can publish again later.

pendingUpdate.title: Pending update
pendingUpdate.description: The submitter edited a published event. The public page still shows the current version until you approve.

approveUpdateDialog.title: Apply this update?
approveUpdateDialog.description: The new content will replace what is currently shown publicly.

rejectUpdateDialog.title: Reject this update?
rejectUpdateDialog.description: The published event stays unchanged. The submitter will see your reason.
rejectUpdateDialog.label: Reason

Blogs.title: Review blog posts
Blogs.description: Review user-submitted articles and publish them publicly.

list.title: Post list
list.description: Click an item to review details.

detail.closeSuccess: Post closed. It is no longer public.

publishDialog.title: Publish this post?
publishDialog.description: The post will appear on the public blog page.

rejectDialog.title: Reject this post?
rejectDialog.description: The submitter will see rejected status with your reason.
rejectDialog.label: Reason

closeDialog.title: Close this post?
closeDialog.description: The post will be hidden from public pages. Data is kept and can be republished later.

pendingUpdate.title: Pending update
pendingUpdate.description: The author edited a published post. The public page still shows the old version until you approve.

approveUpdateDialog.title: Apply this update?
approveUpdateDialog.description: New content will replace what is currently public.

rejectUpdateDialog.title: Reject this update?
rejectUpdateDialog.description: The published post stays unchanged. The submitter will see your reason.
rejectUpdateDialog.label: Reason
